name: Prism Retrieval
desc_clean: Umbra X Prism stones have the unique ability to refract both light and space, providing protection and creating matter from nothing.
mechanic_summary: Prism Retrieval to Spell klanu Umbra. Umbra X Prism stones have the unique ability to refract both light and space, providing protection and creating matter from nothing. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Umbra X Prism stones have the unique ability to refract both light and space, providing protection and creating matter from nothing. I've been able to reverse engineer this power to transport objects and beings across small distances.
